```{r}
library(Seurat)
seurat_obj <- readRDS("colon_immune_raw.rds")
message(sprintf("Before filter: %d genes x %d cells",
  nrow(seurat_obj), ncol(seurat_obj)))
```



``` {r load library and Rds object}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)

##Load the dataset
seuratObj <- readRDS("colon_immune_raw.rds")

##Metric QC
seuratObj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seuratObj, pattern = "^MT-")

# Filter cells
seuratObj <- subset(seuratObj,
  subset = nFeature_RNA >= 100 & percent.mt < 80
)

# Filter genes
counts <- GetAssayData(seuratObj, layer = "counts")
genes_keep <- rowSums(counts > 0) >= 3
seuratObj <- seuratObj[genes_keep, ]

message(sprintf("After initial filtering: %d genes x %d cells",
  nrow(seuratObj), ncol(seuratObj)))
```

```{r}
##QC metric visualization
VlnPlot(seuratObj, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0, combine = FALSE)
plot_1 <- FeatureScatter(seuratObj, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot_2 <- FeatureScatter(seuratObj, feature1= "nCount_RNA", feature2= "nFeature_RNA")
combined <- plot_1 + plot_2
combined
```

```{r}
##Standard cutoff filtering, removing cells with gene features less than 200 and mitochondria more than 10%
seuratObj <- subset(seuratObj, subset = nFeature_RNA >= 200 & percent.mt < 10) 
seuratObj
#high_mt_cells <- seuratObj@meta.data[seuratObj@meta.data$percent.mt > 10, ] <-- checking if the filter works
#head(high_mt_cells)
#head(seuratObj@meta.data)
#dim(seuratObj) #checking the dimension
```

```{r}
##Normalization used NormalizeData in Seurat, multiply bt scale factor 10,000 and log transform to get log(TPX+1) values
seuratObj <- NormalizeData(seuratObj, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
```

```{r}
##Highly variable genes
seuratObj <- FindVariableFeatures(seuratObj, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)

#Identify the 10 most highly variable genes
top10 <- head(VariableFeatures(seuratObj), 10)

# plot variable features with and without labels
plot1 <- VariableFeaturePlot(seuratObj)
plot2 <- LabelPoints(plot = plot1, points = top10, repel = TRUE)
png("variable_features_new.png", width = 1200, height = 600)
print(plot1 + plot2)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
##Data Scaling
seuratObj <- ScaleData(seuratObj, features = VariableFeatures(seuratObj))
```

```{r}
#PCs calculation and PCA plotting
seuratObj <- RunPCA(seuratObj, features = VariableFeatures(object = seuratObj))
print(seuratObj[["pca"]], dims = 1:5, nfeatures = 5)
VizDimLoadings(seuratObj, dims = 1:2, reduction = "pca")
DimPlot(seuratObj, reduction = "pca") + NoLegend()
DimHeatmap(seuratObj, dims = 3, cells = 500, balanced = TRUE)
ElbowPlot(seuratObj)
```

```{r}
#Cell clustering 
seuratObj<- FindNeighbors(seuratObj, dims = 1:10)
seuratObj<- FindClusters(seuratObj, resolution = 0.5)
head(Idents(seuratObj), 5)
```

```{r}
#UMAP Plotting
Idents(seuratObj) <- "seurat_clusters"
seuratObj <- RunUMAP(seuratObj, dims = 1:10)
p <- DimPlot(
  seuratObj,
  reduction = "umap",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  label.size = 6
)
png("UMAP_stdCutOff.png", width = 1200, height = 600)
print(p)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
#saving the file 
saveRDS(seuratObj, file="stdCutOff_colon_latest.rds")
```
